title: Decently Optimized
description: A performance-focused modpack designed to boost FPS by optimizing graphics, reducing lag, and improving game rendering through lightweight mods like Sodium, Lithium and a bunch of more.
body:
📈 Smooth Gameplay Ahead! 🎮![FPS ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/def905bc592253b8312cac058f1cd2b508ef35d4_0.webp)
Looking to boost your FPS without compromising on visuals? "Decently Optimized" is here to deliver! 🚀 This mod pack balances performance and quality for buttery-smooth gameplay. Expect a stable FPS boost, fewer lag spikes, and an overall smoother experience in Minecraft! 🌳✨ **Perfect for explorers, builders, and PvPers alike.
**

![frg](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d3554eb9b6ac2b445f66709ffc327bcbf30c93b3.jpeg)

🏎️ Speed Without Sacrifice! 🖥️

Say goodbye to lag and hello to Decently Optimized! This mod pack is carefully curated to ensure that you get great FPS gains without compromising the look and feel of your game. 🌄⚙️ Dive into Minecraft with confidence as you enjoy high performance, faster load times, and a better overall experience. 🕹️📊


---

🔥 Boost Your FPS, Not Your Specs! 🌌

"Decently Optimized" is the ultimate solution for those looking to supercharge Minecraft performance! ⚡️ This mod pack targets key areas in the game to provide a consistent FPS increase, even on lower-end machines. No extra setup required—just install and enjoy Minecraft like never before! 🚀🎉


---

🌠 High Performance, Minimal Hassle 💡

If you’re ready to level up your Minecraft experience, "Decently Optimized" is for you! With this pack, you’ll see better FPS, smoother chunks, and less lag. 🌍✨ Ideal for any player wanting a clean, optimized, and hassle-free gameplay boost!
